title: Myanmar Orthographic Corrections Schema
description: JSON Schema for validating orthographic_corrections.yaml - Orthographic correction rules for medial confusion, vowel reorder, and stacking errors

medial_confusion_unconditional.description: Medial consonant confusion pairs where the wrong form is always incorrect (no context needed). When 'correct' is a list, order matters — first entry is the preferred suggestion.

medial_confusion_contextual.description: Medial consonant confusion pairs triggered only when followed by specific context tokens.

aukmyit_confusion.description: Missing or extra dot-below (့) creating a valid but wrong word. Context-dependent corrections.

vowel_reorder.description: Pre-normalization vowel ordering errors detected before Unicode normalization silently fixes them.

colloquial_contractions.description: Informal/casual spelling mapped to standard forms.

correction_value.description: Correction target — a single string or an ordered list of strings (first = preferred suggestion)

unconditional_entry.description: Unconditional orthographic correction — always applies regardless of context

correct.description: Correct Myanmar text — string or ordered list (first = preferred)

meaning.description: English meaning or explanation of the correction

contextual_entry.description: Context-dependent orthographic correction — applies only when followed by specific tokens

correct.description: Correct Myanmar text — string or ordered list (first = preferred)

followed_by.description: Context tokens that must follow for this correction to trigger

meaning.description: English meaning or explanation of the correction
